# Copilot Repository Instructions

Treat `.github/memory-bank` as the single source of truth for product and engineering context.

Read these files before planning or implementation:
- `.github/memory-bank/product-context.md`
- `.github/memory-bank/roadmap.md`
- `.github/memory-bank/techContext.md`
- `.github/memory-bank/codingStandards.md`
- `.github/memory-bank/designPrincipals.md`
- `.github/memory-bank/systemPatterns.md`
- `.github/memory-bank/testingStrategies.md`
- `.github/memory-bank/developmentGuide.md`

Working conventions:
- Keep memory-bank content concise and non-duplicative.
- Update existing files instead of creating new docs when possible.
- Keep feature and bug statuses in `roadmap.md` using: `todo`, `inprogress`, `working`.
- Prefer practical implementation guidance over long narrative text.
